Frequently Asked Questions
Q1. When did the ICERT Scientist B Recruitment Online Application Process Start?
The online application process started on 14 July 2026 .
Q2. What is the Exam Date for ICERT Scientist B Recruitment 2026?
The Examination will be conducted in As per Schedule .
Q3. Where can I find the syllabus for the ICERT Scientist B Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete details.
Q4. How can I download the ICERT Scientist B Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
Q5. What is the last date to apply online for ICERT Scientist B Recruitment 2026?
The last date to apply online is 17 August 2026..
Q6. What is the last date to pay the application fee?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 17 August 2026 .
Q7. How can I apply for ICERT Scientist B Recruitment 2026?
ICERT Scientist B Online Form 2026 for 133 Post .
tables: CERT in Scientist B Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 133 Post

Indian Computer Emergency Response Team (CERT-In) has released the Scientist B Notification for the recruitment 2026. Those Candidates Are Interested to the Following ICERT Scientist B 2026 Vacancy Can Apply Online from 14/07/2026 to 17/08/2026. See the Advertisement for information related to age limit, syllabus, Department wise post, selection procedure, pay scale in ICERT Recruitment 2026.
